title: Rename Files - Ability To DO
excerpt:
Very simple. 
Please add the ability to rename files after they have already been uploaded to a project.

posts.author: JordanClarke (Jordan Clarke)
posts.cookedHtml:
Very simple.

Please add the ability to rename files after they have already been uploaded to a project.

posts.author: YuvrajSingh (Yuvraj Singh Rajput)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JordanClarke, you can use Copy Files Pro, the app comes with automation recipes to rename files. For example you can select a text or email column to rename the file and the file will be renamed to the selected column value.

You can also schedule a demo to see how it works.
